About

I am Alex Janiak, a Duke computer science and philosophy graduate interested in rational decision-making, mechanism design, and building things that survive contact with reality.

Education

Duke University (2021-2025)

  • BS Computer Science
  • BA Philosophy
  • Minor Mathematics
